title: boronia ternata var. foliosa
intro: Boronia ternata var. foliosa, also known as the pink boronia or leafy boronia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. This plant is prized for its fragrant pink flowers and its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The leaves of Boronia ternata var. foliosa contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
